steps.name: install
steps.command: uv sync --no-default-groups --group pre-commit --group tests --group dev --group gha-update --extra async --extra dotenv

steps.name: git
steps.command: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y git --no-install-recommends && sudo rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

steps.name: install
steps.command: uv sync --no-default-groups --group testing-extra --group dev --extra email --extra timezone && uv sync --package pydantic_core --no-default-groups --group testing-extra

steps.name: git
steps.command: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y git --no-install-recommends && sudo rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

steps.name: dart-sass
steps.command: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y curl --no-install-recommends && sudo rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/* && ARCH=$(uname -m) && case "$ARCH" in x86_64) SASS_ARCH=linux-x64 ;; aarch64) SASS_ARCH=linux-arm64 ;; *) echo "Unsupported arch: $ARCH" && exit 1 ;; esac && curl -fsSL "https://github.com/sass/dart-sass/releases/download/1.80.3/dart-sass-1.80.3-${SASS_ARCH}.tar.gz" | sudo tar -xz -C /usr/local && sudo chmod -R 755 /usr/local/dart-sass && printf '#!/bin/sh\nexec /usr/local/dart-sass/sass "$@"\n' | sudo tee /usr/local/bin/sass > /dev/null && sudo chmod +x /usr/local/bin/sass

steps.name: asciidoctor
steps.command: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y asciidoctor --no-install-recommends && sudo rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

steps.name: pandoc
steps.command: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y pandoc --no-install-recommends && sudo rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

steps.name: rst2html
steps.command: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y python3-docutils --no-install-recommends && sudo rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

steps.name: install
steps.command: mix local.hex --force && mix local.rebar --force && mix deps.get

steps.name: locales
steps.command: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y locales --no-install-recommends && sudo locale-gen fr_FR.UTF-8 && sudo update-locale && sudo rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

steps.name: tzdata
steps.command: DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y tzdata --no-install-recommends && sudo rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

steps.name: faketime
steps.command: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y faketime --no-install-recommends && sudo rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

steps.name: openjdk-8
steps.command: ARCH=$(uname -m) && case "$ARCH" in x86_64) JDK_ARCH=x64 ;; aarch64) JDK_ARCH=aarch64 ;; *) echo "Unsupported arch: $ARCH" && exit 1 ;; esac && curl -fsSL "https://api.adoptium.net/v3/binary/latest/8/ga/linux/${JDK_ARCH}/jdk/hotspot/normal/eclipse" -o /tmp/jdk8.tar.gz && sudo mkdir -p /usr/lib/jvm/java-8-temurin && sudo tar -xzf /tmp/jdk8.tar.gz -C /usr/lib/jvm/java-8-temurin --strip-components=1 && rm /tmp/jdk8.tar.gz

steps.name: openjdk-11
steps.command: ARCH=$(uname -m) && case "$ARCH" in x86_64) JDK_ARCH=x64 ;; aarch64) JDK_ARCH=aarch64 ;; *) echo "Unsupported arch: $ARCH" && exit 1 ;; esac && curl -fsSL "https://api.adoptium.net/v3/binary/latest/11/ga/linux/${JDK_ARCH}/jdk/hotspot/normal/eclipse" -o /tmp/jdk11.tar.gz && sudo mkdir -p /usr/lib/jvm/java-11-temurin && sudo tar -xzf /tmp/jdk11.tar.gz -C /usr/lib/jvm/java-11-temurin --strip-components=1 && rm /tmp/jdk11.tar.gz

steps.name: install
steps.command: cmake -B build -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Debug && cmake --build build && sudo cmake --install build

steps.name: install
steps.command: (cd pkgs/http && dart pub get) && (cd pkgs/http2 && dart pub get) && (cd pkgs/http_client_conformance_tests && dart pub get) && (cd pkgs/http_multi_server && dart pub get) && (cd pkgs/http_parser && dart pub get) && (cd pkgs/http_profile && dart pub get) && (cd pkgs/web_socket && dart pub get) && (cd pkgs/web_socket_channel && dart pub get) && (cd pkgs/web_socket_conformance_tests && dart pub get)

env.test: (cd pkgs/http && dart test) && (cd pkgs/http2 && dart test) && (cd pkgs/http_multi_server && dart test) && (cd pkgs/http_parser && dart test) && (cd pkgs/http_profile && dart test) && (cd pkgs/web_socket && dart test) && (cd pkgs/web_socket_channel && dart test)
